commit.subject: LU-15212 build: Update ZFS version to 2.0.1
commit.message:
LU-15212 build: Update ZFS version to 2.0.1

Update ZFS version to 2.0.1. The changes are listed in:
https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/releases/tag/zfs-2.0.1

Change-Id: I6e2a979a4521462f679c8addb793199847e8f257
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
